de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.expression.literal

Class RealLiteral

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.expression.Literal
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.expression.literal.RealLiteral
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeYRecoderExtension, java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, Expression, ProgramElement, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, ModelElement

    public final class RealLiteral
extends Literal
implements KeYRecoderExtension
    Literal for JML \real type;
